mapper.select: SELECT * FROM boards ORDER BY sort_order ASC, board_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET board_name = #{boardName}, description = #{description}, is_active = COALESCE(#{isActive}, TRUE), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0) WHERE board_seq = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT post_seq AS postSeq, board_code AS boardCode, title, author_id AS authorId, author_name AS authorName, is_pinned AS isPinned, is_active AS isActive, view_count AS viewCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM board_posts WHERE board_code = #{boardCode} AND is_active = TRUE
AND LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%')
AND (LOWER(author_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{author}), '%') OR LOWER(author_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{author}), '%'))
ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC, post_seq DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT post_seq AS postSeq, board_code AS boardCode, title, content, author_id AS authorId, author_name AS authorName, is_pinned AS isPinned, is_active AS isActive, view_count AS viewCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM board_posts WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_pinned = COALESCE(#{isPinned}, FALSE), is_active = COALESCE(#{isActive}, TRUE) WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq}
UPDATE board_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq}
